Car.MetaTag: Volkswagen Golf 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Tech GTD Euro 6 (s/s) 5dr Diesel Manual Grey
Car.Description: Available now is this stunning and high-performance 2014 (64) Volkswagen Golf 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Technology GTD, a sporty hatchback offering GTI-inspired styling with outstanding diesel economy and strong performance. Powered by the punchy 2.0 TDI diesel engine, the GTD delivers impressive torque, excellent MPG, and a refined yet sporty driving experience — perfect for motorway cruising or everyday driving. ✅ GTD Performance • Excellent MPG • Sporty Hatchback Key Features Include: • GTD styling package • Sports seats with iconic tartan interior • Touchscreen infotainment system • Bluetooth and media connectivity • Cruise control • Dual-zone climate control • Front and rear parking sensors • Alloy wheels • Multifunction steering wheel • Electric windows and mirrors • ISOFIX • LED daytime running lights Drives superb — smooth, powerful, and responsive. No warning lights or mechanical issues. • Recently serviced and inspected • MOT to be renewed at point of sale ✅ Drive away today – reserve VN64 KHJ with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply). 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates. ⸻ Why Buy from AFM | Affordable Motors Billingham? We provide: • Full mechanical inspection • Free comprehensive warranty • HPI clear vehicles (unless otherwise stated) • Fresh valet inside and out • Friendly, honest, and pressure-free service 📞 Call or message us today to arrange a viewing or reserve this Volkswagen Golf 2.0 TDI GTD with AFM | Affordable Motors Billingham.

Car.MetaTag: Vauxhall Astra 1.4i Turbo Design Euro 6 5dr Petrol Manual Black
Car.Description: Available now is this smart and economical 2016 Vauxhall Astra 1.4i Turbo Design, a stylish and practical hatchback offering smooth performance, low running costs, and excellent everyday comfort. Powered by the responsive 1.4 Turbo petrol engine, it delivers strong performance while remaining efficient and ULEZ compliant, making it ideal for commuting, motorway driving, or family use. For added peace of mind, this vehicle has also had the timing chain replaced. ✅ Turbo Petrol • ULEZ Compliant • Timing Chain Replaced Key Features Include: • Design specification • Touchscreen infotainment system • Bluetooth and media connectivity • Cruise control • Air conditioning • Alloy wheels • Multifunction steering wheel • Electric windows and mirrors • ISOFIX • Daytime running lights Drives superb — smooth, responsive, and comfortable.
